description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Tuesday, April 21, we received the "Aoshin 'TASUKI' Donation" from Aome Shinkin Bank.

This donation program was created to support the future of children who drive community development. Through donations, it aims to provide support to children and child-rearing families. The bank has been making annual donations since fiscal year 2023.

This donation will be used as funding to provide "Baby Smile Coupons"—vouchers that parents of newborns (age 0) can use to purchase baby care items and supplies.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13482.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Receipt of donation from Aome Shinkin Bank
